message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Each object has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". The "question" field should be one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" depending on which question. So for question 1, "Chapters". For question 2, "Description". For question 3, "Structure".

We need to evaluate the given text. The text is:

"Šajā darbā līdzības jeb plaģiātisma problemātika tiek apskatīta konceptu karšu kontekstā. Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs."

We need to answer each question:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list any chapters or sections. So it does not comply. Feedback: It doesn't list main sections. So "complies": false.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No, it doesn't describe contents of each section. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, there's no structure. So false.

Thus all three false. Provide feedback accordingly.

We must output JSON array with exactly 3 objects. No extra text. Ensure proper JSON formatting.
